keyPoints: To determine the structure (AR, MA, ARMA) of the model.
To identify the appropriate orders (p, d, q) for the chosen model.
To provide initial parameter estimates to feed into the estimation stage.
commonMistakes: Choosing model orders (p, q) based solely on ACF/PACF plots without considering other criteria like AIC/BIC.
Over-differencing the series (making d too high) which can introduce unnecessary correlation and weaken the model.
Failing to properly account for outliers or structural breaks before identifying the model structure.
